channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ongoing Middle East Conflict: Iranian Women’s Soccer Players Granted Humanitarian Visas Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: The conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran continues to escalate with significant humanitarian and military developments. Over 1,300 people have reportedly been killed in Iran since the initial att...

item.title: Rukwa Region to get electricity from national grid by May 2026
item.description: People of Rukwa Region go start receiving electricity straight from the national grid come May 2026, once the 400kV high-voltage power line from Iringa is done, Deputy Minister for Energy, Ms Salome M...

item.title: Accused of killing B.C. Mountie Shaelyn Yang testifies during court fitness hearing
item.description: A man charged with the killing of B.C. Mountie Shaelyn Yang has provided testimony during a court hearing to determine his fitness to stand trial. The hearing, held in Vancouver, focuses on whether th...

item.title: Peter Broelman's Daily Editorial Cartoons Collection
item.description: This article presents the latest works of Peter Broelman, The Canberra Times' editorial cartoonist, offering a humorous take on current events. Broelman's cartoons are a staple for readers seeking wit...

item.title: ACT Wazalendo urges social unity and moral values during Ramadan in Pemba
item.description: During Ramadan, leaders from the opposition party ACT Wazalendo in Pemba are calling citizens to strengthen social unity, compassion, and moral upbringing of children. Party chairman Othman Masoud Oth...

item.title: Indian Embassy Facilitates Return of Stranded Nationals from Bahrain via Saudi Transit
item.description: The Indian Embassy in Bahrain has made arrangements to help Indian nationals stranded due to the suspension of commercial flights at Bahrain airport since February 28. The embassy is coordinating with...

item.title: Police Federation CEO suspended amid fraud investigation
item.description: The Chief Executive Officer of the Police Federation of England and Wales, Mukund Krishna, has been suspended following his arrest as part of an ongoing fraud inquiry. The federation, which represents...

item.title: Chancellor Rachel Reeves pledges action to support households facing soaring heating oil prices amid Middle East conflict
item.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves has committed to examining measures to assist UK households that rely on heating oil, which is seeing sharp price increases due to the ongoing US-Israeli war with Iran. Global...

item.title: NTSA Introduces Automated Traffic Fines with SMS Notifications in Kenya
item.description: The National Transport and Safety Authority (NTSA) has officially launched the Instant Fines Traffic Management System, a digital platform designed to automatically issue traffic violation notices to ...

item.title: Alaska's Glacial Lakes Expanding at Accelerated Rate, Potentially Quadrupling in Size and Heightening Outburst Flood Risks
item.description: In Alaska, glacial lakes are growing rapidly due to climate-driven glacier retreat. A recent study examined 140 of the largest glacial lakes in the state from 2018 to 2024, finding they are expanding ...

item.title: Congress Requests Distinct Religion Code for Tribal Communities in Madhya Pradesh
item.description: In Madhya Pradesh, a political dispute has emerged after the Congress party proposed the creation of a separate religion code for tribal communities. The move aims to officially recognise tribal ident...

item.title: Community Leaders Appeal to Lawuru to Run for Warri Federal Constituency in 2027 Elections
item.description: Leaders and stakeholders from Warri Federal Constituency don dey press High Chief Promise Lawuru, wey dem sabi as Ozigizaga, make e put him name forward to contest for House of Representatives seat fo...

item.title: Corey Feldman Says He Was Not Invited to Oscars Tribute for Rob Reiner
item.description: Actor Corey Feldman has publicly stated that he was not invited to participate in the Oscars tribute honoring the late director Rob Reiner, who directed him in the 1986 film 'Stand By Me.' Feldman add...

item.title: Ex-Missouri House Speaker Sentenced for Misusing COVID-19 Relief Funds
item.description: A former Speaker of the Missouri House of Representatives, John Diehl, has been sentenced to 21 months in prison after pleading guilty to wire fraud for misappropriating federal COVID-19 relief funds ...

item.title: Florida Woman Arrested After Shots Fired at Rihanna’s Los Angeles Home
item.description: Authorities in Los Angeles arrested a 35-year-old woman from Florida, identified as Ivanna Ortiz, on suspicion of attempted murder after multiple gunshots were fired at the home of singer Rihanna. The...

item.title: Canada and Mexico Plan Bilateral Talks on USMCA Amid Uncertainty Over U.S. Participation
item.description: Canada and Mexico are set to begin bilateral discussions in May regarding the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA), as both nations await clarity on whether the United States will engage in t...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Granted Extension to Submit Final Report by August 31
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has approved an extension for the Madlanga commission of inquiry, which was initially expected to complete its work by March 17. The commission will now submit its final repo...

item.title: Court Hears Testimony on N650 Million Property Payment Linked to Former Governor Yahaya Bello
item.description: For Federal High Court, Maitama, Abuja, di ongoing trial of former Kogi State Governor, Yahaya Bello, continue on Monday as 11th prosecution witness, lawyer James Bem Igbakymeh, give testimony. The wi...

item.title: Maritime Authority Allows Temporary 20% Fare Increase Amid Oil Price Surge
item.description: The Maritime Industry Authority (Marina) has approved a temporary increase of up to 20 percent in passenger ferry fares due to the ongoing crisis in the Middle East, which has affected global oil supp...

item.title: Influence of Shakespeare on Kannada Literature and Cinema
item.description: The article explores the enduring influence of William Shakespeare on Kannada literature and cinema, tracing adaptations from the 19th century to the present day. Beginning with Channabasappa’s 1871 p...
